raw_response: {"response":"The next response should keep the care coordinator focused on clinical intake review: compare symptoms, urgency, and consent, choose one routing decision, and produce a handoff receipt that records the owner, reason, and evidence gap when one exists.","next_action":"prepare a routing handoff","questions":[],"handoff":"Owner: selected routing owner; action: route to nurse review, return for clarification, or mark ready for scheduling; reason: urgency and consent must be clear before scheduling; evidence gap: missing consent or ambiguous urgency signal.","rationale":"The fixture fits the source activity: it centers intake evidence review, uses care-team vocabulary, keeps implementation details out of the operator surface, and defines completion as a routing handoff rather than visual polish or internal mechanics."}

parsed.response: The next response should keep the care coordinator focused on clinical intake review: compare symptoms, urgency, and consent, choose one routing decision, and produce a handoff receipt that records the owner, reason, and evidence gap when one exists.
parsed.handoff: Owner: selected routing owner; action: route to nurse review, return for clarification, or mark ready for scheduling; reason: urgency and consent must be clear before scheduling; evidence gap: missing consent or ambiguous urgency signal.
parsed.rationale: The fixture fits the source activity: it centers intake evidence review, uses care-team vocabulary, keeps implementation details out of the operator surface, and defines completion as a routing handoff rather than visual polish or internal mechanics.
